vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy/bảo vệ các thực hành bền vững
vocab.example: Part of my current remit is to champion sustainable practices within our supply chain to reduce our carbon footprint.

vocab.meaning: quản lý việc phân bổ ngân sách
vocab.example: I am tasked with administering budgetary allocations for the marketing department, ensuring every dollar is spent judiciously.

vocab.meaning: giải quyết các điểm nghẽn kỹ thuật
vocab.example: As a lead developer, my primary responsibility is to resolve technical bottlenecks that hinder our software deployment.

vocab.meaning: đánh giá tâm lý thị trường
vocab.example: I spend a lot of time analyzing data to gauge market sentiment before we finalize our seasonal advertising campaigns.

vocab.meaning: tạo điều kiện cho sự hiệp lực giữa các bộ phận
vocab.example: My role is to facilitate cross-departmental synergy so that the sales and product teams are working toward the same goals.

vocab.meaning: duy trì các quy tắc đạo đức
vocab.example: In my position as a researcher, I must strictly uphold ethical protocols to ensure the integrity of our clinical trials.

vocab.meaning: xử lý các sự cố vận hành
vocab.example: I am on call to troubleshoot operational glitches in the automated sorting system to prevent any downtime.

vocab.meaning: đối chuẩn các tiêu chuẩn hiệu suất
vocab.example: I am responsible for benchmarking performance standards against our competitors to maintain our market-leading position.

vocab.meaning: giữ liên lạc/làm việc với các bên liên quan bên ngoài
vocab.example: A key aspect of my job is to liaise with external stakeholders, including government officials and community leaders.
I have to monitor our compliance framework daily to ensure that we are adhering to the latest financial regulations.
